category: Finance and Investment Decision Support · SuperV4 Decision Support
scope: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis as one SuperV4 single-operation decision-support schema for screening, review, audit evidence, and commercial risk interpretation.

decision_context.system_boundary: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis evaluates one controlled decision boundary inside Finance and Investment Decision Support and excludes broad ERP, dashboard, or multi-module workflows.
decision_context.single_operation_scope: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis as one SuperV4 single-operation decision-support schema for screening, review, audit evidence, and commercial risk interpretation.
decision_context.decision_owner: operator, engineer, owner_cfo, or checker_auditor depending on selected profile mode
decision_context.decision_after_output: Decide whether to proceed, hold, reprice, reject, repair, inspect, derate, outsource, scrap, rework, or escalate the break-even & margin of safety analysis case.
decision_context.cost_of_wrong_decision: Wrong break-even & margin of safety analysis result can cause rework, wrong quote, missed capacity, unsafe screening confidence, downtime, cash leakage, or unnecessary escalation.
decision_context.failure_mode_if_formula_wrong: False PASS, false REPRICE, false HOLD, hidden evidence gap, wrong unit conversion, or public formula leakage.
required_source_documents: user-verified source evidence for critical inputs
measurement or quotation record when available
calibration or uncertainty note when measured values are used
excluded_use_cases: replacement for official tax or regulatory advice
field_use_limitations: Exact acceptance limits must come from user-verified project, asset, standard, material, tax, or commercial source.
Public output must not expose internal formula expressions.

irreversible_commitment_metric.description: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis should not create an irreversible purchase, quote, production, safety, or capital commitment without source verification and review when thresholds are crossed.

standards.name: SI unit system context
standards.role: Unit normalization and unit display consistency

standards.name: GUM-style measurement uncertainty context
standards.role: Uncertainty language, coverage factor, and review logic

standards.name: Internal SectorCalc V5.3.1 formula governance
standards.role: Formula redaction, audit seal, golden hash, and server-only execution

standards.name: User-entered finance and tax assumption context
standards.role: Rates, tax, fees, periods, and accounting treatment are not legal or investment advice

calculation_basis.calculation_character: Protected multi-node formula graph for Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis: demand, capacity, derating, utilization, margin, uncertainty, sensitivity, FMEA trigger, business impact, and decision state.

unit_system.name: SI_BASE_UNITS_WITH_DOMAIN_EXCEPTIONS
unit_system.display_unit_policy: User-selectable display units with base-unit normalization before server execution.

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Fixed costs must be greater than zero.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Fixed costs exceed maximum allowed range.

engineering_range.source: Typical range for fixed costs; user must verify.

reference_values.source: Fixed costs must be verified against actual records.
reference_values.public_note: Enter total fixed costs for the period.

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Selling price must be greater than zero.

reference_values.public_note: Enter the selling price per unit.
Enter the variable cost per unit.

rules.name: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis evidence and service derating
rules.public_note: Derating is server-owned and must not reproduce restricted tables or hidden coefficients.

formulas.name: Normalize and aggregate decision demand
assumptions: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis is treated as a single-operation screening decision.
Inputs are normalized to base units before the private server formula registry executes.
Reference ranges are advisory and never replace measured or user-verified values.
Exact formula expressions are restricted to server/admin/test trace and are not public UI content.
limitations: This schema is decision-support only and not certification, legal proof, or approval.
User must verify standards-sensitive values, rates, material properties, limits, and evidence sources.
If evidence is missing for a critical input, the response must move to REVIEW or BLOCKED according to configured risk level.
edge_cases: Zero or negative denominators must block execution.
Non-finite outputs must block public response.
Unit conversion mismatch must block execution.
Uncertainty band crossing a threshold must trigger review or FMEA.
formulas.public_proof_summary: Normalize and aggregate decision demand is summarized publicly as a protected methodology step for Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis; exact formula details remain server-only.
formulas.protected_methodology_summary: Private formula registry evaluates Normalize and aggregate decision demand using normalized input IDs only and stores deterministic hash evidence.
formulas.checker_note: Checker should verify that Normalize and aggregate decision demand used only normalized IDs and that source evidence aligns with the decision scope.

outputs.name: Contribution Margin per Unit
outputs.public_explanation: Difference between price and variable cost per unit.
outputs.operator_explanation: Each unit contributes this much to fixed costs.

outputs.name: Break-Even Units
outputs.public_explanation: Sales volume needed to cover all costs.
outputs.operator_explanation: Sell at least this many units.

outputs.name: Margin of Safety (%)
outputs.public_explanation: Percent sales can drop before loss.

fields.primary_reason: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis decision is governed by contribution margin, break-even units, and margin of safety.

user_profile_summary.operator: Proceed only if the server response is PASS and no blocker or critical evidence gap is present.
user_profile_summary.engineer: Review governing driver, uncertainty band, derating, normalized units, and source status before accepting the result.
user_profile_summary.owner_cfo: Use the money-at-risk output to decide whether to reprice, hold, or escalate before commitment.
user_profile_summary.checker_auditor: Verify audit seal, schema hash, proof pack redaction, and source-evidence register.

hidden_risk_explanations: Advisory reference bands can be wrong for the actual asset, jurisdiction, material, or commercial case.
A narrow displayed margin can flip when uncertainty or evidence confidence is updated.
Public proof pack intentionally hides exact formulas; checker trace is restricted to server/admin/test context.
next_best_actions: Verify source evidence for critical inputs.
Review reference-range warnings before accepting PASS.
Escalate if utilization is high or uncertainty crosses the threshold.
Use Pro or expert review for safety, compliance, or high-capital decisions.
fields.premium_unlock_reason: Unlock deeper standard-specific golden tests, controlled formula registry implementation, scenario comparison, and full proof-pack export.

business_impact_contract.public_value_statement: Break-Even & Margin of Safety Analysis connects technical uncertainty and evidence gaps to money-at-risk before the user commits.
business_impact_contract.premium_unlock_reason: Detailed scenario comparison, standard-specific acceptance logic, and exportable proof pack belong in paid workflow.

states.label: PASS
states.technical_message: Utilization is inside the server-owned pass band.

states.label: REVIEW
states.technical_message: Utilization or uncertainty requires engineering review.

states.label: WARNING
states.technical_message: Margin is thin or a reference range deviation is material.

states.label: CRITICAL
states.technical_message: High utilization, missing evidence, or decision flip risk is present.

states.label: BLOCKED
states.technical_message: Physical bound, missing critical evidence, non-finite output, or redaction failure blocks response.

states.label: PASS
states.technical_message: Evidence and uncertainty are adequate for screening.

states.label: REVIEW
states.technical_message: Evidence confidence or uncertainty needs review.

states.label: WARNING
states.technical_message: Reference deviation or source weakness can flip the decision.

states.label: CRITICAL
states.technical_message: Critical source weakness or high uncertainty exists.

states.label: BLOCKED
states.technical_message: Missing critical evidence or redaction failure blocks public response.

proof_pack.purpose: Generate review-ready engineering evidence for technical checking, internal review, audit discussion, and engineering documentation.
public_report_rules: Do not expose exact formula expressions.
Do not reproduce restricted standard tables.
Do not mention third-party engineering software brands.
Show source context, use scope, limitation, evidence status, protected methodology, result interpretation, uncertainty, and audit seal.

audit_trail_contract.tamper_warning: Changing any input, unit, schema version, formula version, or output invalidates the audit seal.

reference_code.state_machine_binding: useUniversalIndustrialDecisionFormMachine required; documentation-only state machine fails integration
reference_code.approved_schema_fetch_path: validated production registry, object storage, or static-approved-schema path; database not claimed unless implemented
reference_code.internal_checker_trace_module: restricted server/admin/test only; never public response
